brief.speaker: carol
brief.text: Twenty rows is small but later you'll query tables with millions. LIMIT caps the result. Pull just the first three clients by id.

expected.sql: SELECT id, name FROM clients LIMIT 3

hints.text: Carol: 'Too many rows. LIMIT is an upper bound — did you pick 3?'
Carol: 'Not enough. I asked for three.'
Carol: 'LIMIT controls how many rows come back. Pick 3.'

success.speaker: carol
success.text: Three rows. When you're exploring a huge dataset, that's how you avoid accidentally dumping a million results to the screen.
